rulings.Case Title: ELIZABETH MARIE BARNSON KARNAZES VS. ISERVE et al
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/ Housing Motion Calendar for Monday, January 5, 2015 line 1. DEFENDANT CITIMORTGAGE, INC. ERRONEOUSLY SUED AS, CITIBANK, N.A.'s DEMURRER TO 4TH AMENDED COMPLAINT Sustained without leave to amend. Negligence cause of action is barred by statute of limitations and Plaintiff failed to allege facts re: duty of care as lender. See Nymark v. Heart Fed. Sav. & Loan (1991) 231 Cal. App.3d 1089; Das v. Bank of America (2010) 186 Cal.App.4th 727. Fraud causes of action are not plead with requisite particularity as to each defendant separate, instead allegations re: misrepresentation (who, when, in what manner) are made as to "Citi Defendants." Plaintiff fails to provide any meaningful opposition regarding unavailability of fraud causes of action for representations of future events. (See Opposition 4: 11-25). = (501/RBU)

rulings.Case Title: ANN KONSTIN VS. DELAWARE LAKEWOOD APARTMENTS LLC et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Compelling Responses To Form Interrogatories, Specially Prepared Interrogatories, And Requests For Production Of Documents And For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/ Housing Motion Calendar for Monday, January 5, 2015 line 2. PLAINTIFF ANN KONSTIN's Motion For Order Compelling Responses To Form Interrogatories, Specially Prepared Interrogatories, And Requests For Production Of Documents And For Sanctions OFF CALENDAR per request of the moving party. = (501/RBU)

rulings.Case Title: DERICK DENIES VS. GEORGE HONG et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Re-Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Service
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/ Housing Motion Calendar for Monday, January 5, 2015 line 3. DEFENDANT GEORGE HONG's Re-Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Service DENIED. Subservice on Jackie Tam plus mailing constitutes valid substitute service both as a service on a competent member of household and on a person apparently in charge of the usual mailing address. = (501/RBU)

rulings.Case Title: JEFFREY ENGSTROM VS. ELDO GIACOMETTI ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Re-Notice Of Defendant Eldo Giacomettis Motion And Motion To Strike Portion Of Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/ Housing Motion Calendar for Monday, January 5, 2015 line 4. DEFENDANT ELDO GIACOMETTI's Re-Notice Of Defendant Eldo Giacomettis Motion And Motion To Strike Portion Of Complaint GRANTED. Prayer for judgment page 13, line 27 (loss of earnings); page 14, line 6 (attorney's fees); and Exhibit A are stricken. No opposition filed. Defendant shall have 10 days to answer. Moving party and its counsel is ordered again (See CGC-12-522331 January 23, 2014 Minute Order) to comply with SFLR 2.6C in future. = (501/RBU)

rulings.Case Title: SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY VS. ANGELA WILLINGHAM et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Defendant'S Petition For Relief From Forfeiture, Ccp 1179, Civil Code 3725
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/ Housing Motion Calendar for Monday, January 5, 2015 line 5. DEFENDANT ANGELA WILLINGHAM's Notice Of Defendant'S Petition For Relief From Forfeiture, Ccp 1179, Civil Code 3725 OFF CALENDAR per request of the moving party. = (501/RBU)

rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/ Housing Motion Calendar for Monday, January 5, 2015 line 10. PLAINTIFF NISSIM LANYADOO's MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD GRANTED, subject to opposition. = (501/RBU)

rulings.Case Title: OLIVEIRA RAMOS ET AL VS. SHABANA PATEL ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion's Calendar for Monday, January 5, 2105 Line 6. DEFENDANTS SHABANA PATEL, NASIR PATEL and NASREEN PATEL DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT Sustained with leave to amend for plaintiff to allege a cause of action for unlawful detainer based on non-payment of rent only. Causes of action 2-6 cannot be asserted in a summary unlawful detainer proceeding and should be brought in a separate action. Moving party and its counsel are ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6C in future. Opposing party and its counsel is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6B in future. = (501/RBU)

rulings.Case Title: SFOL VS. PHILLIP BULICEK ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/ Housing Motion Calendar for Monday, January 5, 2015 line 7. DEFENDANT PHILLIP BULICEK's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Complaint sufficiently alleges commercial unlawful detainer. Defendant fails to cite any authorities for the proposition that compliance with or exemption from SFRO needs to be plead in a commercial unlawful detainer. Lease defines late charges and utilities as "rent." Opposing party and its counsel is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6B in future. = (501/RBU)

rulings.Case Title: 735 TAYLOR I1, LP VS. NICOLA SPENCE REINHARDT ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Compel Pltf'S Production Of Documents-Set One
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/ Housing Motion Calendar for Monday, January 5, 2015 line 8. DEFENDANT NICOLA REINHARDT's Motion To Compel Plaintiff's Production Of Documents-Set One DENIED. Moving party fails to establish whether Plaintiff failed to respond to Request for Production or responses were insufficient. (Ilson New Declaration paragraph 4 vs. paragraph 8; Exhibits A.1; A.6; D.1-D.58). Defendant's separate statement fails to comply with CRC 3.1345(c). = (501/RBU)

rulings.Case Title: DIPAK GANDHI VS. KEVIN MARQUEZ ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/ Housing Motion Calendar for Monday, January 5, 2015 line 9. DEFENDANT KEVIN MARQUEZ's MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT GRANTED with leave to amend for Plaintiff to properly allege the beginning date for daily damages. No opposition filed. = (501/RBU)

rulings.Case Title: DIPAK GANDHI VS. KEVIN MARQUEZ ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/ Housing Motion Calendar for Monday, January 5, 2015 line 9. DEFENDANT KEVIN MARQUEZ's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT SUSTAINED with leave to amend for Plaintiff to reconcile the discrepancies in the alleged amounts of rent due. No opposition filed. = (501/RBU)
